slices.name: write_json_report
slices.code:
7 | def write_json_report(data: Any, out_path: Path) -> Path:
   8 |     out_path = Path(out_path)
   9 |     out_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  10 |     with out_path.open("w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
  11 |         json.dump(data, handle, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
  12 |     return out_path

slices.name: format_markdown_section
slices.code:
15 | def format_markdown_section(title: str, body: Union[str, Dict[str, Any], List[Any]]) -> str:
  16 |     lines: List[str] = [f"## {title}", ""]
  17 |     if isinstance(body, str):
  18 |         lines.append(body)
  19 |     elif isinstance(body, dict):
  20 |         for key, value in body.items():
  21 |             lines.append(f"- **{key}**: {value}")
  22 |     elif isinstance(body, list):
  23 |         for item in body:
  24 |             lines.append(f"- {item}")
  25 |     else:
  26 |         lines.append(str(body))
  27 |     lines.append("")
  28 |     return "\n".join(lines)

slices.name: write_markdown_report
slices.code:
31 | def write_markdown_report(title: str, sections: Dict[str, Union[str, Dict[str, Any], List[Any]]], out_path: Path) -> Path:
  32 |     out_path = Path(out_path)
  33 |     out_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  34 |     lines: List[str] = [f"# {title}", ""]
  35 |     for section_title, content in sections.items():
  36 |         lines.append(format_markdown_section(section_title, content))
  37 |     with out_path.open("w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
  38 |         handle.write("\n".join(lines).rstrip() + "\n")
  39 |     return out_path
